tagline: The standard Google Drive connector in Lakeflow Connect allows you ingest Google Drive files into Databricks.
what_it_does: The standard Google Drive connector in Lakeflow Connect allows you ingest Google Drive files into Databricks. You can use read files, spark.read, COPY INTO, and Auto Loader to create Spark DataFrames, materialized views, and streaming tables, enabling you to build custom pipelines for common file ingestion use cases. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: Standard Access Mode: USE CONNECTION
capabilities.desc: Standard Access Mode: USE CONNECTION. Databricks Runtime 17.3 or above. The Excel file format Beta feature enabled, if you want…

use_cases: Auto Loader to create Spark DataFrames
key_takeaway: The standard Google Drive connector in Lakeflow Connect allows you ingest Google Drive files into Databricks.
